title: centaurium serpentinicola
intro: Centaurium serpentinicola, also known as the mountain centaury, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the gentian family. It is a perennial herb with blue or purple flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centaurium serpentinicola include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Centaurium serpentinicola include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken to reap its medicinal benefits.
